# Lustro

> Lustro is a bespoke shoe care and leather restoration service in Los Angeles.
> Founded and operated by Carlos, a craftsman with 37 years of experience.
> Pickup and delivery by appointment only. West Hollywood, CA.

## Services

- Hand shine and conditioning: from $65
- Colour revival and tone matching
- Full leather restoration
- Suede and nubuck treatment
- Boot restoration and resoling prep

## Booking

- By appointment only
- Starts with a $15 deposit applied to the total at delivery
- Pickup and delivery available in Greater Los Angeles

## About

- [Founder — Carlos](https://lustroshoecare.com/#founder): 37 years in the craft. One craftsman handles every pair, start to finish.
- [Our Philosophy](https://lustroshoecare.com/#philosophy): leather care as a considered act, not a transaction
- [Rituals](https://lustroshoecare.com/#rituals): the full service menu
- [Contact](https://lustroshoecare.com/#contact): book a ritual or ask a question

## Hours

Tuesday – Saturday, 10:00 am – 5:00 pm

## Location

West Hollywood, CA · By Appointment Only
